changes.detail: All five required fields present and correct. work_id: KB-UTIL-2-PROMOTE-WIRE-1_creatinine_runtime_authority_switch. branch: work/KB-UTIL-2-PROMOTE-WIRE-1-creatinine-runtime-authority-switch. risk_level: HIGH. execution_model: TWO_PHASE_START_FINISH. change_type: BEHAVIOUR. Cited: automation_bus/latest_cursor_prompt.md lines 1-7.

HIGH correct: sprint proposes a runtime authority switch for signal_creatinine_high, collision adjudication between two active packages, and first-time creation of knowledge_bus/current/latest_knowledge_status.json. All of these are Intelligence Core boundary interactions under SOP §3 and §10. Cited: automation_bus/latest_cursor_prompt.md line 4.

BEHAVIOUR correct: sprint intends to switch which package governs signal_creatinine_high at runtime, resolve collision, and accept/resolve override divergence — all output-affecting runtime changes. No CONTENT-only path exists. Cited: automation_bus/latest_cursor_prompt.md line 6.
TWO_PHASE_START_FINISH correct: explicit baseline checks, preflight, blockers, activation decision, validation, closure protocol. Cited: automation_bus/latest_cursor_prompt.md line 5.

All primary authority files confirmed present in repo. docs/governance/KNOWLEDGE_BUS_SOP_v1.3.1.md — confirmed. docs/governance/KNOWLEDGE_BUS_PASS3_PROMOTION_PROTOCOL_v1.1.md — confirmed. docs/audit-papers/KB-UTIL-2-ACTIVATION-READINESS_creatinine_candidate_divergence_and_collision_resolution_report.md — confirmed. docs/audit-papers/KB-UTIL-2-PROMOTE-PILOT_route_a_single_package_promotion_report.md — confirmed. docs/sprints/launch_core_carry_forward_register.md — confirmed. knowledge_bus/governance/pass3_promotion_decision_register_v1.yaml — confirmed. knowledge_bus/generated_pilot/kb_util_2_pilot/promoted_candidates/pkg_creatinine_high_renal_pass3_v1/ — confirmed (6 files). knowledge_bus/packages/pkg_s24_creatinine_high_renal/ — confirmed (3 files). knowledge_bus/packages/pkg_kb52c_creatinine_high_reduced_glomerular_filtration/ — confirmed (3 files). backend/scripts/validate_knowledge_package.py — confirmed. backend/scripts/validate_promoted_signal_intelligence.py — confirmed. backend/scripts/validate_day_one_architecture.py — confirmed. backend/tests/regression/test_kb_util2_promote_pilot.py — confirmed. backend/tests/regression/test_kb_util2_pass3_pilot_compiler.py — confirmed. backend/tests/architecture/test_day_one_architecture_guardrails.py — confirmed.

knowledge_bus/current/latest_knowledge_status.json does NOT exist — only .gitkeep is present. This is a first-time creation event, not an update. Prompt handling (create only after validator PASS evidence) is correct. No duplicate authority source detected. Cited: knowledge_bus/current/.gitkeep — only file in directory.

Signal identity collision is real and accurately described. knowledge_bus/packages/pkg_kb52c_creatinine_high_reduced_glomerular_filtration/signal_library.yaml line 9: signal_id: signal_creatinine_high. knowledge_bus/generated_pilot/kb_util_2_pilot/promoted_candidates/pkg_creatinine_high_renal_pass3_v1/compile_manifest.yaml line 14: runtime_activation_blocker: real_duplicate_activation_key_collision_with_pkg_kb52c_creatinine_high_reduced_glomerular_filtration. compile_manifest.yaml line 15: runtime_active: false. Prompt Blocker 1 description matches source content exactly.

Override divergence confirmed. knowledge_bus/packages/pkg_s24_creatinine_high_renal/signal_library.yaml lines 44-60: two override rules — or_renal_ckd_stage_3 (egfr < 60.0) and or_renal_acute_imbalance (potassium > 5.2). knowledge_bus/generated_pilot/kb_util_2_pilot/promoted_candidates/pkg_creatinine_high_renal_pass3_v1/signal_library.yaml lines 49-59: one override rule — or_creatinine_high_with_uacr_high (uacr above_max, lab_range_boundary). knowledge_bus/governance/pass3_promotion_decision_register_v1.yaml lines 32-35: override_rules: BEHAVIOURAL_DIFFERENCE_LOW, accepted_with_rationale: false. Prompt Blocker 2 description matches source content exactly. CRITICAL: pkg_kb52c/signal_library.yaml lines 61-74 show pkg_kb52c already uses UACR escalation (or_creatinine_high_with_uacr_high) — the eGFR/potassium divergence is exclusively between pkg_s24 and the promoted candidate, not between pkg_kb52c and the promoted candidate.

KB-UTIL-2-ACTIVATION-READINESS report accurately describes current state (read in full). compile_manifest.yaml confirms promotion_status: compiled_not_promoted (line 13) and runtime_active: false (line 15). Decision register lines 47-48 confirm runtime_activation_decision classification: compiled_not_promoted. No stale findings inherited — all re-verified against current file content.

Behavioural scope explicitly defined: collision adjudication between pkg_kb52c and promoted candidate, override divergence acceptance/resolution, potential runtime authority switch, potential first-time creation of latest_knowledge_status.json. All bounded by STOP conditions. Regression targets named: existing tests in test_kb_util2_promote_pilot.py plus 8 new tests required. No-op sprint protection satisfied — real work required on collision, divergence, package promotion, tests. Cited: automation_bus/latest_cursor_prompt.md lines 107-248.

Existing coverage: backend/tests/regression/test_kb_util2_promote_pilot.py (6 tests, read lines 1-129) — covers promotion state, legacy preservation, validators, collision blocker classification, latest_knowledge_status.json boundary. New tests required by prompt: 8 additional assertions covering single active authority, no legacy overwrite, promoted package validates, PSI validates, authority file update gating, no raw Pass_3 runtime read, rollback documented, blockers cleared or activation refused. Cited: automation_bus/latest_cursor_prompt.md lines 239-249.

Out-of-scope section explicitly prohibits bulk ROUTE_A promotion, CRP/inflammation work, ROUTE_C adjudication, legacy package deletion, manual clinical rule invention, frontend changes, root-cause replacement, card evidence runtime consumption, LLM narrative generation. Runtime boundary restricts SignalEvaluator/frontend/SSOT/scoring changes to strictly necessary only. STOP condition 8 provides hard gate. Cited: automation_bus/latest_cursor_prompt.md lines 328-341.

Key determinism risk: if both pkg_kb52c and promoted candidate are placed in knowledge_bus/packages/ with signal_id signal_creatinine_high, any package loader that scans the directory without authority adjudication would see duplicate signal definitions. Prompt requires collision resolution before activation. STOP condition 2 provides hard gate. Advisory 1 below surfaces the near-identical content of pkg_kb52c to aid collision adjudication.

Nine STOP conditions cover all material failure modes: unknown runtime authority mechanism, unresolvable duplicate authority, divergence requiring clinical adjudication, SignalRegistry broader behavioural risk, package validation failure, PSI validation failure, undefined rollback path, frontend/scoring/SSOT change requirement, ARCH-RT validator failure. No gap identified.

No changes to SignalEvaluator, frontend, SSOT (backend/ssot/), scoring thresholds, or unit conversion proposed. STOP conditions 4 and 8 provide hard gates. Runtime boundary section explicitly lists forbidden files. Cited: automation_bus/latest_cursor_prompt.md lines 253-265.

advisories.title: pkg_kb52c is functionally near-identical to promoted candidate — materially aids collision adjudication
advisories.detail: Read from source files: pkg_kb52c/signal_library.yaml line 9 — signal_id: signal_creatinine_high. Lines 55-73: same activation_logic (lab_range_exceeded), same override rule (or_creatinine_high_with_uacr_high, uacr above_max, lab_range_boundary, source_kdigo_ckd_2024). Near-identical explanation text. Both compiled from Batch_4_Pass_3.json for inv_creatinine_high_reduced_glomerular_filtration. Only material differences: schema_version (pkg_kb52c 2.0.0 vs promoted candidate 1.0.0) and supporting_metrics format (pkg_kb52c uses extended role/availability/rationale fields; promoted candidate uses simple list). Cursor should recognise during authority preflight that Option A (candidate supersedes pkg_kb52c) or Option D (functionally equivalent, retain one canonical) are both likely viable. If either is chosen, promoted package_manifest.yaml line 14 (legacy_supersedes: pkg_s24_creatinine_high_renal) must be updated to also record pkg_kb52c adjudication outcome.

advisories.title: latest_knowledge_status.json does not yet exist — this sprint creates it for the first time if activation proceeds
advisories.detail: knowledge_bus/current/ contains only .gitkeep. Prompt gating (validator PASS required before update/creation) is correct and sufficient. Cursor should not create the file before all validation evidence is in hand.

advisories.detail: knowledge_bus/generated_pilot/kb_util_2_pilot/promoted_candidates/pkg_creatinine_high_renal_pass3_v1/package_manifest.yaml line 3: behavioural_impact: NONE. This describes the promoted candidate's own compiled state as of the prior sprint, not this sprint's architectural impact. This sprint is change_type: BEHAVIOUR and must be treated as HIGH risk throughout. The manifest field must not be used to justify relaxing behavioural controls.
